name: SuiMCP (Mysten)
description: 12 tools: wallet management, balance queries, Move build/test/publish. Built by Mysten Labs engineer.
install: claude mcp add sui-mcp -- npx -y sui-mcp

name: Sui MCP (Tamago Labs)
description: 33+ tools: wallet ops, staking, Scallop DeFi integration, Pyth oracle prices, SuiNS domains, transaction analytics.

name: Sui MCP Tools (dwong)
description: Sui blockchain toolkit: test token faucet requests, wallet management, smart contract interactions. Supports testnet/devnet.
install: claude mcp add sui-tools -- npx -y sui-mcp@latest

name: Sui Agent MCP (EasonC13)
description: 14 tools: wallet control (sign/approve/reject transactions), Move build/test/publish, on-chain object queries, contract decompilation.
install: claude mcp add sui -- npx -y sui-agent-mcp

name: Sui GraphQL MCP
description: Query Sui blockchain via GraphQL API from Claude. Checkpoints, balances, transactions, transaction simulation. Supports mainnet/testnet/devnet.
install: claude mcp add sui-graphql -- npx -y github:Sceat/sui-graphql-mcp

name: Sui Butler
description: Serverless MCP server with zkLogin auth. 30+ tools: wallet ops, Cetus DEX swaps, Pyth oracles, staking, SuiNS domains, Move development.
install: claude mcp add sui-butler -- npx -y sui-butler

name: Sui MCP Server (RAG)
description: RAG-powered MCP for Sui Move. FAISS vector DB, GitHub Move file extraction, semantic search over Move documentation and code.

name: Sui Trader MCP
description: AI agent token swaps on Sui mainnet via Cetus Aggregator. Optimal routing, slippage control, fixed input/output modes.

name: Sui AI Agent Kit
description: DeFi tools for Suilend, STEAMM, SpringSui, Navi. MCP server + TypeScript framework for AI agents on Sui.

name: Sui Wallet MCP
description: Wallet management, transactions, and blockchain operations for Sui.
install: claude mcp add sui-wallet-mcp -- npx -y sui-wallet-mcp

name: SuiSource MCP
description: Source code verification for Sui Move packages. Verify on-chain contract source authenticity.
install: claude mcp add suisource-mcp -- npx -y suisource-mcp

name: SuiNS MCP
description: SuiNS domain name service integration: resolve .sui names, register domains, lookup addresses.
install: claude mcp add suins-mcp -- npx -y suins-mcp

name: Sui Dev MCP (Motion Labs)
description: AI-powered Sui development tools: semantic search, code analysis, generation, and intelligent error debugging for Sui.

name: NAVI Protocol MCP
description: Official NAVI DeFi interface. Read-only: lending pools, swap quotes, bridge discovery, DCA orders, Volo Vault analytics, wallet risk assessment. Free, no API key.
install: claude mcp add --transport http navi-protocol https://open-api.naviprotocol.io/api/mcp

name: Walrus MCP Server
description: Store and retrieve data on Walrus decentralized storage network (Sui-coordinated). Blob upload/download via MCP.
install: claude mcp add walrus-mcp -- npx -y walrus-mcp

name: Pyth Network MCP
description: Real-time Pyth oracle price feeds via Hermes API. 1930+ feeds across 107+ chains (incl. Sui). TWAP, volatility, backtesting.
install: claude mcp add pyth -- npx -y pyth-network-mcp

name: DefiLlama MCP
description: DeFi data via DefiLlama API: TVL metrics, DEX volumes, protocol stats, stablecoin data, token prices, yield pools. Covers all Sui DeFi protocols.
install: claude mcp add defillama -- npx -y mcp-server-defillama

name: DeFi Yields MCP
description: Explore DeFi yield opportunities powered by DefiLlama. Filter by chain (Sui) or project. APY analysis, 30-day mean, predictions.

name: DexScreener MCP
description: Real-time DEX pair data, token info, market stats across multiple chains including Sui. Token profiles, boosted tokens, pair search.
install: claude mcp add dexscreener -- npx -y dexscreener-mcp-server

name: CoinGecko MCP
description: Official CoinGecko MCP: real-time prices, market caps, volume for 15k+ coins. GeckoTerminal on-chain DEX data for 200+ networks incl. Sui.

name: Birdeye MCP
description: On-chain crypto data: trending tokens, new launches, OHLCV history, wallet analytics across 10+ chains. Requires Birdeye API key.

name: Crypto Indicators MCP
description: 50+ technical analysis indicators: RSI, MACD, moving averages, volume analysis. Trading signals (BUY/SELL/HOLD). Configurable exchange.

name: Whale Tracker MCP
description: Track large crypto whale transactions in real-time via Whale Alert API. Filter by blockchain, minimum value. Transaction details.

name: CryptoPanic News MCP
description: Real-time crypto news from CryptoPanic. Filter by currency, content type, region. No API key required.

name: Tatum Blockchain MCP
description: Blockchain data API + RPC gateway for 130+ networks. Wallet balances, NFT metadata, token portfolios, raw RPC calls. Unified interface.

name: deBridge MCP
description: Cross-chain swaps and bridging across 28+ chains (EVM + Solana). Optimal route finding, fee estimation, transaction tracking. Non-custodial.

name: Relay Bridge MCP
description: Cross-chain bridge and swap quotes via Relay Protocol. 85+ chains, fee estimation, transaction tracking, deep links. 8 tools.
install: claude mcp add relay -- npx -y relay-mcp

name: GOAT Onchain Agent MCP
description: 200+ onchain actions across Ethereum, Solana, Base and 30+ chains. Lightweight, modular plugin system. MCP adapter included.

name: Armor Crypto MCP
description: Wallet creation, swaps, DCA, stop-loss, take-profit, bridging. Solana now; Sui, Ethereum, Base coming in beta. MIT licensed.

name: GitHub MCP Server
description: Official GitHub MCP: browse repos, manage issues/PRs, analyze code, monitor Actions workflows, security findings. Essential for any dev.

name: Postgres MCP Pro
description: Configurable read/write Postgres access + performance analysis. Index recommendations, query optimization. For Sui indexer backends.

name: Supabase MCP
description: Official Supabase MCP: database, auth, storage, edge functions. 20+ tools. Design tables, run SQL, manage migrations. Great for Sui dApp backends.

name: Cloudflare MCP Server
description: Access entire Cloudflare API (2500+ endpoints): DNS, Workers, R2, Zero Trust. Codemode generates JS against OpenAPI spec.

name: Sentry MCP
description: Error monitoring: retrieve issues, errors, projects from Sentry. Automated fix suggestions via Seer AI. Hosted, no install needed.

name: Notion MCP
description: Official Notion MCP: search, retrieve, update pages/blocks/databases. AI-accessible workspace documentation for Sui project management.

name: Linear MCP
description: Linear project management: find/create/update issues, projects, comments. Initiatives, milestones. OAuth-based remote server.

name: Slack MCP
description: Official Slack MCP: search channels, send messages, retrieve history. Workflow automation and notifications for Sui dev teams.

name: DeepWiki MCP
description: AI-generated documentation for any GitHub repo. Ask questions, read wiki structure/contents. Free, no auth. Great for exploring Sui codebases.

name: Filesystem MCP
description: Official file operations MCP: read/write/edit files, create directories, search. Configurable access controls. Essential for Move development.
